headline: Lennar Debuts New Attached Home Community in Santa Clarita
summary: Lennar, one of the nation's leading homebuilders, today announced the debut of Sage at Sand Canyon, a brand-new attached home community now selling in Santa Clarita's Sand Canyon area. Offering modern home designs at attainable price points, Sage at Sand Canyon presents an exciting new homeownership opportunity for homebuyers looking for peaceful suburban living with easy access to downtown Los Angeles.

headline: Lennar Lowers 2026 Outlook As Mixed Results Test Housing Demand
summary: Lennar (NYSE:LEN) reported mixed Q2 2026 results, with revenue below expectations and profitability down compared with the prior year. The company lowered its full year 2026 home delivery outlook, citing affordability pressures and elevated mortgage rates. Management highlighted ongoing challenges from high borrowing costs and cautious buyers, even as some operating efficiencies improved. Lennar enters this update with its share price at $90.3 and the stock down 16.0% over the past year...

headline: Paychex To Rally More Than 39%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Monday
summary: Top Wall Street analysts changed their outlook on top names. See all rating changes on our analyst ratings page. Barclays, Wells Fargo, Piper Sandler, Leerink Partners, Truist Securities, and Citigroup updated their price targets and ratings for AVA, LEN, GMED, SABS, PDM, and PAYX. Evercore ISI Group and Truist Securities also raised their price targets and ratings for LEN and DDOG.

headline: Iran Truce Sealed, SpaceX Storms Wall Street and Warsh Steps to the Mic
summary: The Iran war is over - at least on paper - and the largest IPO in market history landed on Wall Street the same week the Federal Reserve hands the chairman's gavel to Kevin Warsh. That's a lot to digest before the bell, and oil at $83 is just the opening sentence.
